entities.name: Manual-to-Product debt
entities.context: Framework describing operational and technical debt created when selling manual processes as finished software

entities.name: Fake it till you make it
entities.context: Principle that the Manual-to-Product strategy is an application of in software engineering

entities.name: product-market fit
entities.context: Business validation outcome achieved immediately through this strategy

entities.name: selling the product before it exists
entities.context: High-variance founder strategy of selling outcomes before automation is built

relationships.from: selling the product before it exists
